calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Authorizing And Instructing Trustee To Pay Attorney Fees From Trust.
Off Calendar Jun-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Stephen Gould appearing for and with petitioner Eric Holm. Derek Knudsen appearing for Helen Kline, objector. Keith Bilter appearing for Theodore Grove, successor trustee. Mr. Bilter has filed a response stating that they are neutral. Any fees paid should be prorated between the Marital Trust and Bypass Trust. Court's tentative ruling is Petition for instruction is granted as to allowing payment of attorney fees from the Trust. Allocation issue is reserved. Oral argument presented by Mr. Knudsen and Mr. Gould. All parties stipulated to allocation to be made between the Martial Trust and the Bypass Trust. No portion is allow from the Unitrust. Matter granted. Order signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Arias.
